debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

proof:
have hne : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx h => this (h ▸ hx)
  have hint1 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x) volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id fun x hx => hne x hx
  have hint2 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x ^ 2) volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuousOn_const.div (continuous_pow 2).continuousOn fun x hx => pow_ne_zero 2 (hne x hx)
  rw [integral_add hint1 hint2, integral_one_div this]
  have h2 : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = 1/a - 1/b := by
    have hderiv : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun y => -y⁻¹) (1 / x ^ 2) x := fun x hx => by
      have hxne : x ≠ 0 := hne x hx
      convert (hasDerivAt_inv hxne).neg using 1
      field_simp
    rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt hderiv hint2]
    ring
  rw [h2, log_div (ne_of_gt hb) (ne_of_gt ha)]
  ring
successful_attempts:
have hne : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], x ≠ 0 := fun x hx h => this (h ▸ hx)
  have hint1 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x) volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id fun x hx => hne x hx
  have hint2 : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => 1 / x ^ 2) volume a b := by
    apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    exact continuousOn_const.div (continuous_pow 2).continuousOn fun x hx => pow_ne_zero 2 (hne x hx)
  rw [integral_add hint1 hint2, integral_one_div this]
  have h2 : ∫ x in a..b, 1 / x ^ 2 = 1/a - 1/b := by
    have hderiv : ∀ x ∈ [[a, b]], HasDerivAt (fun y => -y⁻¹) (1 / x ^ 2) x := fun x hx => by
      have hxne : x ≠ 0 := hne x hx
      convert (hasDerivAt_inv hxne).neg using 1
      field_simp
    rw [integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt hderiv hint2]
    ring
  rw [h2, log_div (ne_of_gt hb) (ne_of_gt ha)]
  ring
